channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Eman Bacosa Pacquiao on Why His Mom Felt Grateful for His Collaboration with Piolo Pascual
item.description: Young actor Eman Bacosa Pacquiao, son of boxing icon Manny Pacquiao, opened up about a project that holds a sentimental place in his family’s heart — his collaboration with veteran actor Piolo Pascual...

item.title: Siaya Governor Orengo Cites Breach of Integrity in Call for Ruto’s Impeachment
item.description: Siaya Governor James Orengo has come out strongly calling for the impeachment of President William Ruto, accusing him of repeatedly disregarding constitutional values through divisive and inflammatory...

item.title: House justice panel invites VP Sara Duterte to attend impeachment hearing on March 25
item.description: Inimbitahan ng House Committee on Justice si Vice President Sara Duterte na personal na dumalo sa nakatakdang pagdinig sa March 25 kaugnay ng mga reklamong impeachment laban sa kanya. Ayon kay Batanga...

item.title: Zee Nxumalo reflects on identity, authenticity and creative growth ahead of new EP
item.description: At just 23, Zee Nxumalo has quickly become one of South Africa’s most influential young artists, moving from viral success to a firmly established presence in the local music scene. In this interview,...

item.title: Iran escalates attacks on Middle East oil and gas infrastructure
item.description: Iran has carried out over 15 missile and drone strikes on oil fields, refineries, gas plants, and ports across the Middle East, signalling a potential continuation of conflict in the region. These att...

item.title: Artists across India collaborate to address rising censorship and threats to creative freedom
item.description: A recent incident at the Udaan Children’s Literature Festival in Patna has sparked renewed concern about growing censorship and intolerance within India’s artistic and literary spaces. The controversy...

item.title: DHQ Explains CDS Statement on Community Role in Fighting Terrorism in Borno and Yobe
item.description: The Defence Headquarters (DHQ) don clear matter say the Chief of Defence Staff (CDS), General Olufemi Oluyede, no dey accuse everybody for Borno and Yobe say dem dey support terrorists. According to t...

item.title: University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey found dead in Barcelona after search
item.description: Authorities in Barcelona, Spain, confirmed the recovery of 20-year-old University of Alabama student James 'Jimmy' Gracey's body after he went missing earlier in March. Gracey, a junior from Elmhurst,...

item.title: Report Shows Nigeria Leads West Africa in Civic Freedom Violations
item.description: According to a fresh report by Spaces for Change (S4C), Nigeria don top the list of civic freedom violations across West Africa between July 2022 and December 2024. The study, titled ‘Civic Space in W...

item.title: PM Modi Holds Talks With West Asian and European Leaders on Regional Tensions and Stability
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi engaged in a series of high-level discussions with leaders from Qatar, France, Jordan, and Oman to assess the evolving situation in West Asia amid rising tensions involvin...

item.title: How Looksmaxxing Reflects Changing Ideas of Masculinity in a Digital Age
item.description: The article explores the rise of 'looksmaxxing,' a growing social media phenomenon in which young men and teenage boys treat their faces and bodies as projects to optimize for attractiveness and statu...

item.title: Court orders equal division of joint estate after husband fails to prove forfeiture claim
item.description: A South African court has ruled that a wife is entitled to an equal share of the joint estate following a divorce, after her husband failed to prove that she should forfeit her benefits. The couple ha...

item.title: Parliament Urges Infrastructure and Staff Improvements at Mwananyamala Hospital
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Health and AIDS Affairs has urged the Tanzanian government to prepare a detailed strategic plan to improve infrastructure at the Mwananyamala Regional Referral ...

item.title: Rivers State targets revenue touts and strengthens tax compliance
item.description: Rivers State Internal Revenue Service (RIRS) don announce say dem go tackle anybody wey dey promote multiple taxation or dey evade tax for di state. Israel Egbunefu, wey be RIRS Executive Chairman, ta...

item.title: Reform UK launches manifesto pledging lower Scottish income tax
item.description: Reform UK, led in Scotland by Malcolm Offord, has unveiled its manifesto for the 2026 Holyrood election, promising to align Scotland's income tax bands with the rest of the UK before cutting rates bel...

item.title: NYS Recruitment Moved to Saturday Due to Public Holiday Gazette
item.description: The National Youth Service (NYS) has announced that its ongoing national recruitment exercise will now take place on Saturday, March 21, 2026, instead of Friday, March 20. This change comes after Inte...

item.title: Ramaphosa Faces Scrutiny Over Handling of the TRC Cases Inquiry
item.description: The opinion piece probes President Cyril Ramaphosa’s puzzling decision not to oppose the recusal bid by former presidents Jacob Zuma and Thabo Mbeki against retired Constitutional Court Justice Sisi K...

item.title: Construction of Naivasha-Kisumu-Malaba SGR Extension Begins
item.description: President William Ruto has officially kicked off the construction of the Naivasha-Kisumu-Malaba Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) at Suswa in Narok County. The project is being carried out by China Communi...

item.title: Trump compares US strikes on Iran to Pearl Harbor during talks with Japanese Prime Minister
item.description: On 19th March 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump met with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi at the White House and, during the discussion, drew a historical parallel between U.S. military strikes ...

item.title: Tricycle drivers in Caloocan receive fuel subsidy on program’s final day
item.description: Hundreds of tricycle drivers gathered in Caloocan City on Friday for the final day of the government’s fuel subsidy payout, part of a broader initiative to help public transport workers cope with risi...
